title: D3 Success Metric Recontract — M3+ Real Replay Success Rate
scope: D3 SSOT success metric only (/api/replay/d3-strategy-status-coverage). No DB write, no replay backfill, no registry/adapter/migration change. Legacy /api/replay/d3-strategy-status-audit contract untouched.

metric_change.before: any-hit draw success: MAX(hit_count >= 1 OR special_hit = 1)
metric_change.special_hit: EXCLUDED — special_hit alone never makes a draw an M3+ success; only hit_count >= 3 counts
metric_change.denominator: distinct target_draw in the window (unchanged — GROUP BY lottery_type, strategy_id, target_draw already collapsed multi-bet cells to one entry per draw)

new_contract_fields.special_hit_note: special_hit alone does NOT count as M3+ success; only hit_count >= 3 counts
new_contract_fields.denominator: distinct target_draw in the window (not replay row count)
new_contract_fields.metric_history: P263B used any-hit (hit_count>=1 OR special_hit); P265A recontracted to M3+ (hit_count>=3)

files_modified.lottery_api/routes/replay.py: M3+ criterion in _d3_compute_success_rates; contract comment; _D3_SUCCESS_METRIC/_D3_SUCCESS_METRIC_LABEL constants; success_rate_contract dict (success_metric/metric_label/special_hit_excluded/denominator/metric_history); _D3_SAFETY_DISCLAIMERS M3+ lines. Legacy audit endpoint untouched.
files_modified.index.html: P263B SSOT section: column headers '30/100/500/1500期' -> '... M3+' with tooltips; section description M3+ wording; disclaimer banner M3+ definition + special_hit exclusion + not-approval/not-betting lines

validation.api_sanity_check: PASS — BIG_LOTTO single-bet 54%->~0-1.5% M3+; echo_aware_3bet 94%->5-6.5% M3+; multi-bet denominator = distinct draws
validation.browser_check: NOT RUN — live backend on the SSOT port not guaranteed; static wording verified via HTML inspection
